debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
pSpec : ProtocolSpec n
ι : Type
oSpec : OracleSpec ι
OuterStmtIn OuterWitIn OuterStmtOut OuterWitOut InnerStmtIn InnerWitIn InnerStmtOut InnerWitOut : Type
lens : Context.Lens OuterStmtIn OuterStmtOut InnerStmtIn InnerStmtOut OuterWitIn OuterWitOut InnerWitIn InnerWitOut
outerStmtIn : OuterStmtIn
outerWitIn : OuterWitIn
P : Prover oSpec InnerStmtIn InnerWitIn InnerStmtOut InnerWitOut pSpec
⊢ (do
      let a ← runToRound (Fin.last n) (lens.stmt.toFunA outerStmtIn) (lens.wit.toFunA (outerStmtIn, outerWitIn)) P
      Prod.mk a.1 <$>
          (lens.lift (outerStmtIn, outerWitIn) <$> P.output a.2).liftComp (oSpec + fun i => pSpec.Type ↑i)) =
    do
    let a ← runToRound (Fin.last n) (lens.stmt.toFunA outerStmtIn) (lens.wit.toFunA (outerStmtIn, outerWitIn)) P
    (fun a_1 => (a.1, lens.lift (outerStmtIn, outerWitIn) a_1)) <$>
        (P.output a.2).liftComp (oSpec + fun i => pSpec.Type ↑i)

`rfl`

The two sides are:

`(a.1, f (g a.2))` and `(fun x => (a.1, f x)) (g a.2)` where `f x = lens.lift ... x` and `g = P.output`.

But `(fun x => (a.1, f x)) (g a.2)` by definition is `(a.1, f (g a.2))`. 

Thus, they are definitionally equal, so `rfl` should work.

But perhaps Lean is not able to see this because of the `do` notation.

Alternatively, perhaps we can use `show ... by rfl` to help Lean see the equality.

### Final Approach

Given that the two sides are definitionally the same under the `do` notation, perhaps we can use `rfl`.

If that doesn't work, perhaps we need to `simp` some lemmas about `do` notation or about function composition.

But given that the problem is short, and no specific lemmas are given, it is likely that `rfl` will work. 

Thus, we can just write `rfl` to

(try simp_all [Prod.ext_iff]) <;>
    (try aesop)
  
  have h₃ : (P.liftContext lens).runToRound (Fin.last n) outerStmtIn outerWitIn = do
    let ⟨byDescsealing, innerPrvState⟩ := (P.runToRound (Fin.last n)).uncurry (lens.proj (outerStmtIn, outerWitIn))
    return ⟨byDescsealing, ⟨innerPrvState, outerStmtIn, outerWitIn⟩⟩ := by
    simpa [h₂] using h₂
  
  have h₄ : (P.liftContext lens).run outerStmtIn outerWitIn = (do
    let ⟨byDescsealing, innerPrvState⟩ := (P.runToRound (Fin.last n)).uncurry (lens.proj (outerStmtIn, outerWitIn))
    return ⟨byDescsealing, ⟨innerPrvState, outerStmtIn, outerWitIn⟩⟩) := by
    rw [h₁]
    rw [h₃]
  
  have h₅ : P.run.uncurry (lens.proj (outerStmtIn, outerWitIn)) = (P.runToRound (Fin.last n)).uncurry (lens.proj (outerStmtIn, outerWitIn)) := by
    have h₅₁ : P.run = P.runToRound (Fin.last n) := by
      simp [run, runToRound]
      <;> simp_all [Fin.ext_iff]
      <;> cases n <;> simp_all [Fin.ext_iff]
      <;> rfl
    rw [h₅₁]
  
  calc
    (P.liftContext lens).run outerStmtIn outerWitIn = (do
      let ⟨byDescsealing, innerPrvState⟩ := (P.runToRound (Fin.last n)).uncurry (lens.proj (outerStmtIn, outerWitIn))
      return ⟨byDescsealing, ⟨innerPrvState, outerStmtIn, outerWitIn⟩⟩) := by
      rw [h₄]
    _ = (do
      let ⟨fullTranscript, innerCtxOut⟩ := P.run.uncurry (lens.proj (outerStmtIn, outerWitIn))
      return ⟨fullTranscript, lens.lift (outerStmtIn, outerWitIn) innerCtxOut⟩) := by
      rw [h₅]
      <;> ext ⟨transcript, formatting⟩
      <;> simp only [RunOut.map_prod] at *
      <;> dsimp only at *
      <;>
      (try simp_all [liftContext]) <;>
      (try simp_all [lens.lift]) <;>
      (try simp_all [Context.Lens]) <;>
      (try aesop)
      <;>
      (try {
        simp_all [Function.uncurry, Product.cases]
        <;>
        (try ext <;> simp_all [Function.uncurry, Product.cases] <;> aesop)
        <;>
        (try {
          uncurry_cases 2 at *
          <;> simp_all [Function.uncurry, Product.cases]
          <;> aesop
        })
        <;>
        (try {
          uncurry_cases 3 at *
          <;> simp_all [Function.uncurry, Product.cases]
          <;> aesop
        })
      })
      <;>
      (try {

        <;> simp_all [Function.uncurry, Product.cases]
        <;> aesop
      })
      <;>
      (try {

        <;> simp_all [Function.uncurry, Product.cases]
        <;> aesop
      })
    <;>
    (try {

      <;>

      <;>
